### 🎯 Type of Change

*(List specific changes:)*

- [ ] Tested in light mode

### ✅ Checklist

- [ ] All links are functional (no broken URLs)
- [ ] Alt-text added to all images/SVGs
- [ ] Color contrast meets WCAG AA (4.5:1 minimum)
- [ ] Animations respect `prefers-reduced-motion`
- [ ] No JavaScript (GitHub CSP compliant)
- [ ] Responsive design tested (<640px, <1024px, >1024px)
- [ ] Dark/light mode compatibility verified
- [ ] Images optimized (<100KB for PNG, optimized SVG)
- [ ] Commit messages follow Conventional Commits
- [ ] No secrets or sensitive data exposed
